description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, horizontal layout. The structure features large, rectangular volumes with clean lines and extensive use of glass, especially facing the garden and pool area. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a landscaped backyard with a swimming pool, surrounded by lush greenery and flowering trees. The front facade is more enclosed, with a driveway and garage area, while the central section includes a courtyard or open-air garden. The exterior is predominantly light gray or white, with some darker accents and transparent glass elements. The overall design emphasizes openness, integration with outdoor spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a central courtyard, and a backyard pool surrounded by greenery. The structure is spacious, low-profile, and features clean, minimalist lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard greenery and pool.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the flat roof, central courtyard, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the backyard, pool, and lush landscaping along the back facade.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle emphasizing the garden, trees, and the open courtyard area adjacent to the main living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows facing the backyard
